messages.text: Hello! Welcome to the Grievance Registration System. I am here to help you register your complaint today. May I know your full name please?

Thank you, Neeraj! I'm glad to have you on board. Now, could you tell me which category your issue falls under?

Is it Water Supply, Electricity, Road, Sanitation, Network, or something else? Please let me know, and I'll guide you through the registration process.
